leadText: If you were looking for the character whose Japanese name is Ether, see Cherie. The Ether (Japanese: ピーピーエイド PP Aid) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation I. It restores 10 PP for one of a Pokémon's moves. It has three improved counterparts: Max Ether, Elixir, and Max Elixir.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it fully restores 10 PP for one of its moves .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Restores the PP of the selected move by 10. G S C Restores PP of one move by 10. R S E Colo XD Restores the PP of a selected move by 10. FR LG Restores a selected move's PP by 10 points for one Pok é mon . D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 It restores the PP of a Pokémon's selected move by a maximum of 10 points. X Y OR AS S M US UM This medicine can restore 10 PP to a single selected move that has been learned by a Pokémon. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA This medicine can be used to restore 10 PP to a single selected move that has been learned by a Pokémon. S V A medicine that can be used to restore 10 PP to a single move that a Pokémon knows.

Wonder Launcher [ edit | edit source ] The Ether appears as a Wonder Launcher item. It costs 12 points to use.
